landing.rolesTitle: All participants work in one execution circuit
landing.rolesText: Every participant uses one sign-in. The system resolves the role, organisation and available workspace after authentication.

login.title: Sign in
login.lead: The system resolves the role, organisation and permissions after the account is verified.
login.required: Enter your work email and password.
login.unavailable: Sign-in failed. Check the details or restore access.
login.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Try signing in again later.
login.mfaLead: The password was accepted. Complete sign in with a second factor.
login.mfaInstruction: Use the six-digit code from your authenticator app or one backup code.
login.mfaInvalid: The code is incorrect or has already been used.
login.mfaExpired: The verification window has expired. Start sign in again.
login.mfaRateLimited: Too many incorrect codes. Try again later.
login.note: After sign-in, the system opens the workspace assigned to the organisation. A role cannot be selected or changed through the URL.

recovery.requestLead: Enter your work email. The response is the same whether or not an account exists.
recovery.unavailable: The service is temporarily unavailable. Try again later.
recovery.universalSuccess: If the account exists, a message with a reset link has been sent. Check the spam folder as well.
recovery.requestNote: The link is valid for 15 minutes and can be used once. Support will never ask for your password or the code from the message.
recovery.resetLead: All active sessions will be revoked after the password is saved. You will need to sign in again.
recovery.passwordClasses: At least three groups: lowercase, uppercase, digits and special characters.
recovery.passwordPolicyError: The password does not meet the security requirements.
recovery.invalidLink: The link is invalid, expired or already used. Request a new one.
recovery.completedLead: The new password has been saved.
recovery.sessionsRevoked: All previously active sessions have been revoked.

support.title: Transparent Price support
support.description: Questions about onboarding, access or platform operation
support.name: Name
support.messagePlaceholder: Briefly describe the question about the platform, access, documents or technical onboarding.
support.consent: I consent to the processing of personal data for the purpose of responding to this request.

errors.name: Enter your name.
errors.contact: Enter a phone number or email for the reply.
errors.consent: Confirm consent to personal data processing.
errors.delivery: The request was not sent. Try again later.

success.title: Request sent
success.text: The request has been accepted. A reply will be sent to the contact provided after review.
